query: UPDATE users SET username = LOWER(username) WHERE username IS NOT NULL AND username != '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute UPDATE users SET username = LOWER(username) WHERE username IS NOT NULL AND username != '';
